attestation.statement: Clinician (clinical sign-off authority) confirmed having clinically reviewed all 50 CVD (Cardiovascular) answer keys in this batch and attests them clinically correct, and authorised ingest.
attestation.recorded_by: claude-opus-4-8 (agent, on clinician's explicit written confirmation in-session)
attestation.scope: all CVD casebundles in this batch (n=50)

transform_flags: Age not stated in the source note — inferred ~84 (older_adult) as a conservative placeholder for the required demographics.age field; maintainer/clinician to confirm.
Sex not stated in the source note — inferred female for the required demographics.sex_at_birth field; no source signal, clinician to confirm.
Provisional case_id SPEC-CARD-03-00207 — SEQ derived from source CDV-007; ingest --reseq will assign the real globally-unique sequence within the SPEC-CARD-03 bucket.
Specialty classified CARD (cardiology); reviewer may prefer EPHYS (electrophysiology) given the conduction focus.

Difficulty classified red_herring_laden (DD=03): the source lists inferior AMI, hypothyroidism and vasovagal as reasoned-out differentials, and the case turns on not under-triaging an acutely decompensated bradycardia.

Telehealth reprojection applied: the source is a physically-present after-hours aged-care assessment (auscultation, JVP, capillary refill, 12-lead ECG). Clinician-only exam/ECG/bloods sealed into nodes 10/11 with telehealth_limits; staff-reported vitals (HR, BP, SpO2, temp, RR, weight, appearance) placed in 01.objective_data_offered as caregiver_reported, verified:false.

Baseline tier set T5 (000 emergency ambulance) as the telehealth-honest conservative action for unstable bradycardia; the source clinician's non-emergency ambulance to ED maps to T4, retained as minimum_viable_tier_for_pass.

In-person/paramedic interventions (atropine, transcutaneous pacing, IV therapy, digoxin-immune Fab) reprojected to recognition + escalation; no drug dose synthesised. Withholding of metoprolol and digoxin is a carer-actionable deprescribing instruction, not a new prescription.
Candidate SNOMED/ICD-10-AM/AMT codes are unverified_pending_terminology_receipt; AMT substance codes for metoprolol/digoxin are best-effort candidates for the terminology server to resolve.

ingest.hashing: SHA-256 over canonical (JSON 2-space + trailing newline) bytes of each split node
